title: Add evidence grading and done-before-forcing functions to v6.4 direction
description: Incorporate additional feedback that AOF/QIF acted as records rather than done-before forcing functions. Add E2E observable evidence, evidence independence grading, rubric-based render review, Guardian fixed questions, and living QIF ledger requirements to v6.4.
triage_notes: Completed second feedback intake: v6.4 direction now includes evidence independence grading, user-visible E2E evidence, Guardian fixed questions, rubric-based visual review, and living QIF ledger requirements.
